description: Enterprise techniques used by DCRAT, ATT&CK software S9017 (v1.0)
name: DCRAT (S9017)

techniques.comment: [DCRAT](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9017) can patch Microsoft’s Antimalware Scan Interface (AMSI) to evade detection.(Citation: Zscaler BlindEagle DEC 2025)
[DCRAT](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9017) can use certificate-based authentication for C2 servers.(Citation: Zscaler BlindEagle DEC 2025)
[DCRAT](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9017) can log keystrokes on targeted systems.(Citation: Zscaler BlindEagle DEC 2025)
The [DCRAT](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9017) configuration file is encrypted using AES-256.(Citation: Zscaler BlindEagle DEC 2025)
